nuclear_shell_batch.title: Produce a batch of 4 Create Nuclear Shells — uses alexscaves:nuclear_bomb in Mechanical Crafter

trinity_test.title: Fire a Create Nuclear Shell from a Big Cannon at a designated test site — the Trinity moment

subtitle.text: Ch10 built the reactor. Ch17 fires the shell. Oppie said: now I am become death. You already know what that means.

description: CH.17 · NUCLEAR TRINITY
▸ The nuclear chain started in Ch10.',
The reactor was built.',
The uranium processed.',
The Steel Reactor came online.',
Ch17 is where the shell is fired.',
The Trinity test: the first nuclear detonation.',
Find an empty biome. Set up the cannon. Fire.',
◈ NUCLEAR SHELL PRODUCTION
└ Create Nuclear Shell (canonnukes:nuke_shell):',
Requires alexscaves:nuclear_bomb in Mechanical Crafter',
Nuclear Bomb: crafted from uranium materials (Create: Oppenheimered)',
Mechanical Crafter: 3×3 or 5×5 arrangement for the recipe',
└ Create Big Cannons: the firing platform',
Cannon barrel: 3-7 block length',
Fuze type: impacts detonation timing',
Elevation: angle barrel for range control',
└ Batch target: 4 shells minimum (1 test + 3 operational)',
◈ TRINITY TEST SETUP
└ Designate a test site: empty biome, away from base',
(nuclear explosion destroys terrain in radius)',
└ Safe distance: position yourself 100+ blocks from impact point',
└ Create Teleporter: place a teleporter at test site',
(instant evacuation if explosion radius estimate is wrong)',
└ Fire: load shell → set fuze → ignite → observe',
└ Document: Exposure camera photograph of the mushroom cloud',
(for the Antique Atlas + museum documentation)',
◈ STEEL REACTOR INTEGRATION
└ Steel Reactor (canonnukes:) produces SU for your Create network',
└ Running reactor: passive power generation',
└ Nuclear Shell + Reactor: dual-use of uranium supply chain',
(reactor for power, shells for kinetic yield)',
▸ Oppenheimer said: now I am become death, the destroyer of worlds.',
He was quoting a text about war.',
You have been through 17 chapters of building.',
The nuclear shell is the moment the builder',
acknowledges what they can destroy.',
Fire it at an empty biome.',
Take the photograph.',
Then go home.',
▶ Produce a batch of 4 Nuclear Shells [check]
▶ Fire a Nuclear Shell at the Trinity test site [check]
◇ Nuclear Shell blast radius: check canonnukes: mod docs.',
Build the test site at minimum 200 blocks from your base.',
Your teleporter network makes evacuation instant.',
Register the test site as a teleporter destination beforehand.',
Fire. Photograph. Return.
